##LOCALITY=Langban, Filipstad, Varmland, Sweden
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Rock Currier
##DESCRIPTION=Compact aggregate of very pale yellow grains with evident cleavage, associated with black hausmannite

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
